description: You are logged into the wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Users often search for exercises using acronyms, but they are currently missing. Add the alias 'RDL' to the 'Romanian Deadlift' exercise, 'OHP' to the 'Overhead Press' exercise, and 'BSS' to the 'Bulgarian Split Squat' exercise. Do not rename the original exercises or create new separate exercises for these acronyms.
